name: hermes-relay-for-chrome
description: Browser extension for Hermes Agent by Nous Research with page context, continuity, tracked pages, and AI handoff.

scripts.check:js: find extension scripts test \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) | sort | xargs -n1 node --check
scripts.check: npm run check:manifest && npm run check:js && npm run test && npm run test:e2e
